name: Braided Seagrass Round Basket - Brightroom™
description:
This Braided Seagrass Round Basket from Brightroom™ is a beautiful fusion of craft and utility. Designed in a round shape, this basket is braided from seagrass to bring artisanal charm to your decor. The open-top construction allows easy access to the contents inside and the side handles make it simple to carry, making it ideal for storing stationery, craft supplies, spare throws and much more.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
